case_title: RAJESH YALAMANCHILI VS. SAMSUNG ELECTRONICS AMERICA , INC

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,496.28 FILED BY YALAMANCHILI, RAJESH AS TO DEFENDANT SAMSUNG ELECTRONICS AMERICA INC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-26-2024 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
AMENDED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $85 SERVED DEC-15-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SAMSUNG ELECTRONICS AMERICA INC

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YALAMANCHILI, RAJESH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SAMSUNG ELECTRONICS AMERICA INC $1,160.00 PRINCIPAL, $135.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,295.00, DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF: FOR MISSED AND LATE SERVICE APPOINTMENTS UNDER CAL. CIV. CODE 1722 AS WELL AS DAMAGE TO PLAINTIFF'S HOME. PLAINTIFF DID NOT MEET BURDEN OF ESTABLISHING RIGHT TO OTHER DAMAGES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED NO EXHIBITS FILED
